seller_info_text: Dispatched from and sold by ChironMediaLtd.
description: Prepare with confidence for your GCSE Music exams using OCR GCSE Music Listening Tests. Designed by experienced teachers, this study aid provides everything students need to approach the Listening and Appraising component with skill and accuracy. The book includes three complete sample papers that mirror the format and style of the real examination. Each paper is supported by downloadable audio tracks so students can practice with authentic listening examples. * * Clear guidance is provided on how to approach questions, manage exam timing, and identify key musical features. Full answers to every question allow learners to check their work, learn from mistakes, and develop stronger exam strategies. A comprehensive glossary of technical terms reinforces essential vocabulary, ensuring students feel confident using subject-specific language in written responses. * * This book is ideal for classroom use, independent revision, or teacher-led study sessions. It provides a structured framework that supports both practice and self-assessment. As a trusted music teacher resource, it saves educators preparation time while giving students a reliable exam-ready toolkit. For young adults preparing for the OCR GCSE Music qualification, it also makes a thoughtful gift for pianists or any aspiring musician who wants to strengthen listening and appraisal skills. Read more
